name: COA IX
description:
It's pretty new and there is barely any information about about it!!! But I love the setting and character designs for this one so I decided to make a small fun bot. It's my first bot and also with just the little information I got from playing the event and watching the video on YouTube. Though I tried my best and hope it works well.

Call of the Abyss IX (shortly known as COA IX) is the ninth tournament part of Call of the Abyss, and has an angelic utopian theme. It takes inspiration from the 1956 Isaac Asimov short story "The Last Question".
creator: DOMIONNADIA
